memories.content: Waves 1-10 CRUD (2026-01-14). Market Data Pipeline 253K (2026-02-05). ReportSettings + Zod (2026-02-07). Sales Analysis (2026-02-10). Construction Pipeline (2026-02-11). UW Model Grouping Phase 3-4 (2026-03-03). Activity logging, Docker, Tech Debt, Extraction Hardening (2026-02-12→03-03). Login Flow + Auth Guards (2026-03-03). Local OneDrive Extraction (2026-03-03). Deals Overhaul + v5 (2026-03-04). Group Pipeline Frontend, Vite opt (2026-03-05). Cap Rate TC T3 re-run + 49 regression tests (2026-03-05). UW Grouping Expansion: 9 groups, 66 files (2026-03-06). Proforma Returns UI Option C (2026-03-06). Phase 2-3 Dashboard Integrity (2026-03-06). Phase 4 Final Gate (2026-03-09). Architecture review v2: 59/71 findings resolved (83%). Test gap batch 0d00b35 (+383 tests). F-055 comparison persistence + F-068 PDF enrichment (584fd2c). Batch 3 running: 7 agents for F-003/041/045+069/046/054/057/067.

conda env: dashboard-backend. Dev: npm run dev:all (auto-opens Edge). Git: stash apply over pop, don't push unless asked. NO mock/fake data. User: matt@bandrcapital.com / Wildcats777!! / admin. User expects Agent Team approach from docs/agent-team-reference.md. Don't tunnel-vision on grep results — execute full agent team plan with 6 parallel agents. Data observations (items 8-12) are NOT issues. Cordoba != Cordova. Option C for old UW model attributes. Auth login uses form data (not JSON). Kill servers: kill $(lsof -ti :5173) $(lsof -ti :8000). docs/multifamily_data_guide.docx should NOT be deleted.

Zod: .nullable().optional() + ?? undefined (NOT ?? 0). TWO API CLIENTS: src/lib/api.ts (axios) + src/lib/api/client.ts (fetch). shadcn needs CSS vars in :root + tailwind mappings. KPICard: treatZeroAsNA prop (default true). Property detail: lazy enrichment via CRUDProperty.enrich_financial_data() — delegates to services/enrichment.py. Zod property schema expects full nested structure — backend must return 0s not null objects. SQLite tests: no server_default, datetime.now(UTC), StaticPool. _dec()/to_decimal() converts float->Decimal. _property_transforms.py: _is_placeholder_city() catches Unknown/submarkets-as-cities. F-047: client.ts returns null as unknown as T for non-JSON, keep Promise<T> signature to avoid cascade.

LOCAL_DEALS_ROOT=/mnt/c/Users/MattBorgeson/OneDrive - B&R Capital/B&R Capital - Real Estate/Deals. Quick Extraction and Group Pipeline are INDEPENDENT systems writing to same extracted_values table. All 9 deferred groups extracted (66 files, 2,970 values). DB: 597,713 extracted values, 329 properties, 75 runs. 48 properties have city='Unknown' — resolved at transform layer.

59/71 findings resolved (83%). 7 agents running for batch 3: F-003 (CRITICAL background worker), F-041 (documents FK migration), F-045+F-069 (ADR docs), F-046 (dual logging), F-054 (report polling), F-057 (soft-delete), F-067 (auth docs). After batch 3: F-018 (Alembic sync), F-042 (VARCHAR constraints — chains on F-041), F-056 (optimistic locking), F-063 (component test umbrella). CI: backend timeout=600s, -p no:randomly. Tracking: docs/findings-and-recommendations.md. Total tests: 3,792. OTHER: Extract 28 ungrouped files, production hosting, mobile/iOS, security audit.
